description_long: This lamp features a striking, modern design with a central hub from which multiple slender arms radiate outward in a circular arrangement. Each arm ends in a flat, disc-shaped element, likely serving as the lamp's light diffusers or reflectors, giving the fixture a dynamic, starburst appearance. The lamp is suspended from a ceiling mount by a single, straight rod, emphasizing its intended use as a hanging fixture. The overall construction appears to be metallic, with a smooth, glossy finish that reflects light and enhances its contemporary aesthetic. The symmetrical distribution of the arms and discs creates a balanced, sculptural form that would serve as a focal point in any urban interior or public space. The lamp's design suggests it is both decorative and functional, providing ambient illumination while acting as a statement piece.
description: A modern, starburst-style pendant lamp with multiple metallic arms ending in flat, disc-shaped reflectors, suspended from a ceiling mount. Its glossy finish and sculptural form make it both decorative and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of arms and discs radiating from the central hub, with the ceiling mount and suspension rod clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the three-dimensional spread of the arms and the varying angles of the disc-shaped reflectors.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the circular distribution of the arms and the uniformity of the disc elements around the central hub.
description_view_3: View similar to the front, but from a slightly different angle, showing the even spacing and alignment of the arms and discs.
